texts:
NovaCRM Company Overview

NovaCRM is an AI-powered customer relationship management platform founded in 2021 in San Francisco. The company serves over 15,000 businesses worldwide, ranging from small startups to Fortune 500 enterprises.

ng from small startups to Fortune 500 enterprises. Our mission is to make every customer interaction intelligent, personalized, and effortless. NovaCRM combines traditional CRM capabilities with advanced AI features including predictive lead scoring, automated email campaigns, intelligent call routing, and real-time sentiment analysis.

nt call routing, and real-time sentiment analysis. NovaCRM was named a Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader in 2024 and has raised $180M in Series C funding led by Sequoia Capital. The platform processes over 2 billion customer interactions per month across email, phone, chat, and social media channels.

oss email, phone, chat, and social media channels. Key differentiators:
- AI-first architecture with models trained on 500M+ customer interactions
- Real-time analytics dashboard with customizable KPIs
- Native integrations with 200+ business tools
- SOC2 Type II and HIPAA compliant
- 99.99% uptime SLA for Enterprise customers

NovaCRM Product Features

Contact Management:
NovaCRM provides a unified customer profile that aggregates data from all touchpoints. Each contact record includes interaction history, purchase history, support tickets, sentiment scores, and AI-generated relationship health indicators. Contacts can be organized into segments, lists, and custom hierarchies. The system supports up to 50 million contacts per organization.

pports up to 50 million contacts per organization. Deal Pipeline:
The visual deal pipeline supports unlimited custom stages, weighted probability scoring, and AI-powered deal health predictions. Drag-and-drop interface for moving deals between stages. Automated alerts when deals are at risk of stalling. Revenue forecasting uses historical close rates and current pipeline velocity.

torical close rates and current pipeline velocity. Email Automation:
Create multi-step email sequences with conditional branching based on recipient behavior (opens, clicks, replies). AI-generated subject lines increase open rates by an average of 23%. Built-in A/B testing for subject lines, send times, and content variations. Supports dynamic content personalization with merge fields and conditional blocks.

lization with merge fields and conditional blocks. Phone System (NovaCRM Voice):
Built-in VoIP phone system with call recording, transcription, and real-time sentiment analysis. AI-powered call coaching provides real-time suggestions during customer calls. Automatic call logging and CRM record updates. Supports local and toll-free numbers in 40+ countries.

orts local and toll-free numbers in 40+ countries. Chat Widget (NovaCRM Chat):
Embeddable website chat widget with AI chatbot capabilities. The chatbot can answer common questions, qualify leads, and schedule meetings before routing to a human agent. Supports file sharing, screen sharing, and video calls within the chat interface. Available in 25 languages.

hin the chat interface. Available in 25 languages. Analytics & Reporting:
Real-time dashboards with 50+ pre-built report templates. Custom report builder with drag-and-drop interface. Supports data export to CSV, Excel, and PDF. Scheduled report delivery via email. Advanced analytics include cohort analysis, funnel visualization, and attribution modeling.

s, funnel visualization, and attribution modeling. Workflow Automation:
Visual workflow builder for automating repetitive tasks. Trigger workflows based on events (new lead, deal stage change, ticket created) or schedules. Actions include sending emails, creating tasks, updating records, calling webhooks, and routing to team members. Supports conditional logic, delays, and parallel branches.

- Mobile app access
- 2 GB file storage per user

th (1-hour response time, dedicated Slack channel) All plans include a 14-day free trial with full access to Business plan features. No credit card required for trial. Annual billing saves 20% compared to monthly billing. Volume discounts available for 50+ users.

NovaCRM API Documentation — Overview

The NovaCRM API is a RESTful API that provides programmatic access to all CRM data and functionality. All API endpoints use HTTPS and return JSON responses.

Base URL: https://api.novacrm.com/v2

Authentication:
All API requests require authentication via API key. Include your API key in the Authorization header:
Authorization: Bearer nova_key_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

r:
Authorization: Bearer nova_key_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx API keys can be generated from Settings > Integrations > API Keys in the NovaCRM dashboard. Each key can be scoped to specific permissions (read-only, read-write, admin).

Rate Limits:
- Starter: 1,000 requests per day
- Professional: 10,000 requests per day
- Business: 100,000 requests per day
- Enterprise: Custom (typically 1,000,000+ per day)

Enterprise: Custom (typically 1,000,000+ per day) Rate limit headers are included in all responses:
- X-RateLimit-Limit: Maximum requests allowed
- X-RateLimit-Remaining: Requests remaining in current window
- X-RateLimit-Reset: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

When rate limited, the API returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.

he API returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header. Pagination:
List endpoints support cursor-based pagination:
- limit: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)
- cursor: Cursor token from previous response
- sort: Field to sort by (prefix with - for descending)

h ID 12345 was not found",
    "status": 404
  }
} Common error codes:
- 400 BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request parameters
- 401 UNAUTHORIZED: Missing or invalid API key
- 403 FORBIDDEN: Insufficient permissions
- 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: Requested resource doesn't exist
- 409 CONFLICT: Resource already exists or version conflict
- 429 RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests
- 500 INTERNAL_ERROR: Server error (contact support)

NovaCRM API — Contacts Endpoint

List Contacts:
GET /v2/contacts
Query parameters: limit, cursor, sort, email, company, created_after, created_before, tag
Returns a paginated list of contacts.

Get Contact:
GET /v2/contacts/{contact_id}
Returns a single contact with all fields and associated data.

ingle contact with all fields and associated data. Create Contact:
POST /v2/contacts
Required fields: email OR phone (at least one)
Optional fields: first_name, last_name, company, title, phone, address, tags, custom_fields
Returns the created contact with generated ID.

Update Contact:
PATCH /v2/contacts/{contact_id}
Send only the fields you want to update. Returns the updated contact.

Delete Contact:
DELETE /v2/contacts/{contact_id}
Soft-deletes the contact. Can be restored within 30 days from the trash.

ct. Can be restored within 30 days from the trash. Merge Contacts:
POST /v2/contacts/merge
Body: { "primary_id": "...", "secondary_ids": ["...", "..."] }
Merges multiple duplicate contacts into one. All interactions are preserved.

Bulk Operations:
POST /v2/contacts/bulk
Supports bulk create, update, and delete operations.
Maximum 1,000 contacts per request. Processed asynchronously for large batches.
Returns a job_id that can be polled for status.

s.
Returns a job_id that can be polled for status. Contact Timeline:
GET /v2/contacts/{contact_id}/timeline
Returns all interactions (emails, calls, meetings, notes, deals) in chronological order.
Supports filtering by interaction type and date range.

Contact Enrichment:
POST /v2/contacts/{contact_id}/enrich
Triggers AI-powered data enrichment. Automatically fills in company info, social profiles, and job details from public sources. Costs $0.05 per enrichment.

NovaCRM API — Deals Endpoint

List Deals:
GET /v2/deals
Query parameters: limit, cursor, sort, stage, owner_id, pipeline_id, value_min, value_max
Returns a paginated list of deals.

Get Deal:
GET /v2/deals/{deal_id}
Returns a single deal with all fields, associated contacts, and activity history.

Create Deal:
POST /v2/deals
Required fields: name, pipeline_id
Optional fields: stage_id, value, currency, expected_close_date, owner_id, contact_ids, company_id, custom_fields
Returns the created deal.

ompany_id, custom_fields
Returns the created deal. Update Deal:
PATCH /v2/deals/{deal_id}
Send only the fields to update. Changing stage_id triggers pipeline automation.

Move Deal Stage:
POST /v2/deals/{deal_id}/move
Body: { "stage_id": "...", "note": "..." }
Moves a deal to a new stage and optionally adds a note. Triggers any configured stage-change automations.

Win/Lose Deal:
POST /v2/deals/{deal_id}/win
POST /v2/deals/{deal_id}/lose
Body: { "reason": "...", "note": "..." }
Marks a deal as won or lost with an optional reason and note.

l as won or lost with an optional reason and note. Deal Forecast:
GET /v2/deals/forecast
Query parameters: period (monthly, quarterly, yearly), pipeline_id
Returns AI-powered revenue forecast based on current pipeline, historical close rates, and deal health scores.

Deal Health Score:
GET /v2/deals/{deal_id}/health
Returns an AI-generated health score (0-100) with risk factors and recommended actions. Factors include: time in stage, engagement level, competitor mentions, and sentiment trends.

NovaCRM Integrations

NovaCRM integrates with 200+ business tools across the following categories:

Email:
- Gmail (two-way sync, email tracking, templates)
- Outlook/Office 365 (two-way sync, calendar integration)
- SMTP/IMAP (any email provider via custom configuration)

Calendar:
- Google Calendar (meeting scheduling, availability sync)
- Outlook Calendar (meeting scheduling, availability sync)
- Calendly (automatic meeting logging)

ility sync)
- Calendly (automatic meeting logging) Communication:
- Slack (deal notifications, @mentions, slash commands)
- Microsoft Teams (deal notifications, meeting scheduling)
- Zoom (automatic meeting recording and transcription)
- Twilio (custom SMS and voice integration)

Marketing:
- Mailchimp (contact sync, campaign tracking)
- HubSpot Marketing (lead attribution, campaign sync)
- Google Ads (conversion tracking, audience sync)
- Facebook Ads (lead ads sync, conversion tracking)
- LinkedIn Sales Navigator (profile enrichment, InMail tracking)

es Navigator (profile enrichment, InMail tracking) Payments:
- Stripe (invoice creation, payment tracking, subscription management)
- PayPal (payment tracking)
- QuickBooks (invoice sync, revenue reporting)
- Xero (invoice sync, financial reporting)

Support:
- Zendesk (ticket sync, customer context)
- Intercom (conversation sync, lead qualification)
- Freshdesk (ticket sync)

Development:
- GitHub (issue tracking, PR notifications)
- Jira (issue sync, sprint tracking)
- Salesforce (bi-directional data sync for migration)

alesforce (bi-directional data sync for migration) Data & Analytics:
- Snowflake (data warehouse sync)
- BigQuery (analytics export)
- Tableau (live dashboard connection)
- Looker (embedded analytics)

Custom integrations can be built using the NovaCRM API and webhook system. Enterprise customers get access to dedicated integration development support.

cess to dedicated integration development support. Setting Up Integrations:
Navigate to Settings > Integrations in the NovaCRM dashboard. Click "Connect" next to the desired integration. Most integrations use OAuth 2.0 and can be set up in under 2 minutes. Some integrations (like Snowflake) require additional configuration.

NovaCRM Security & Compliance

Data Security:
- All data encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256)
- Data stored in SOC2 Type II certified data centers (AWS us-east-1, eu-west-1)
- Automatic daily backups with 30-day retention
- Point-in-time recovery available for Enterprise customers
- Data residency options: US, EU, or Australia

ers
- Data residency options: US, EU, or Australia Access Control:
- Role-based access control (RBAC) with customizable roles
- Object-level and field-level permissions
- IP whitelisting (Business and Enterprise plans)
- Two-factor authentication (2FA) required for all accounts
- SSO via SAML 2.0 (Business and Enterprise plans)
- Session management with configurable timeout

ns)
- Session management with configurable timeout Audit & Compliance:
- Comprehensive audit logs tracking all data access and changes
- SOC2 Type II certified (report available upon request)
- GDPR compliant with data processing agreement (DPA)
- CCPA compliant
- HIPAA compliance available as Enterprise add-on ($500/month)
- Annual third-party penetration testing by CrowdStrike
- Bug bounty program via HackerOne

by CrowdStrike
- Bug bounty program via HackerOne Data Handling:
- Right to deletion: Users can request complete data deletion
- Data export: Full data export available in JSON or CSV format
- Data retention: Configurable retention policies per data type
- Sub-processors: List of sub-processors available at novacrm.com/subprocessors
- AI model training: Customer data is NOT used to train shared AI models. Enterprise customers can opt-in to train custom models on their own data.

n opt-in to train custom models on their own data. Incident Response:
- 24/7 security operations center (SOC)
- Mean time to detect (MTTD): < 15 minutes
- Mean time to respond (MTTR): < 1 hour
- Incident notification within 72 hours per GDPR requirements
- Post-incident reports provided within 5 business days
- Status page: status.novacrm.com

NovaCRM Getting Started Guide

Step 1: Create Your Account
Visit app.novacrm.com/signup and enter your email address. You'll receive a verification email within 30 seconds. Click the link to activate your account and set your password. No credit card required for the 14-day free trial.

No credit card required for the 14-day free trial. Step 2: Set Up Your Organization
After signing in, you'll be guided through initial setup:
- Company name and industry
- Team size and primary use case
- Timezone and currency preferences
- Logo upload (displayed in emails and chat widget)

Logo upload (displayed in emails and chat widget) Step 3: Import Your Data
NovaCRM supports importing contacts and deals from:
- CSV/Excel files (up to 500,000 rows per import)
- Salesforce (full migration tool with field mapping)
- HubSpot (full migration tool with field mapping)
- Pipedrive (contact and deal import)
- Google Contacts
- Outlook Contacts

The import wizard guides you through field mapping and deduplication. Large imports (>50,000 contacts) are processed in the background and typically complete within 30 minutes.

ckground and typically complete within 30 minutes. Step 4: Connect Your Email
Go to Settings > Email and connect your Gmail or Outlook account. This enables:
- Automatic email logging to contact records
- Send emails directly from NovaCRM
- Email open and click tracking
- Email templates and sequences

and click tracking
- Email templates and sequences Step 5: Set Up Your Pipeline
Navigate to Deals > Pipeline Settings to customize your sales stages. Default stages are: Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost. You can rename, add, or remove stages. Set probability percentages for revenue forecasting.

Step 6: Invite Your Team
Go to Settings > Team to invite colleagues. Assign roles (Admin, Manager, Sales Rep, Read-Only) to control access. Managers can see their team's activities and pipeline. Admins have full access to all settings.

pipeline. Admins have full access to all settings. Step 7: Install Integrations
Connect your essential tools from Settings > Integrations. Recommended first integrations: email provider, calendar, and Slack/Teams for notifications.

Step 8: Customize Your Workspace
- Create custom fields for contacts and deals
- Set up saved views and filters
- Configure notification preferences
- Set up workflow automations for common tasks

Need help? Book a free 30-minute onboarding call at novacrm.com/onboarding or contact support@novacrm.com.

NovaCRM Troubleshooting Guide

Email Sync Issues:
Problem: Emails not appearing in contact timeline
Solution: Go to Settings > Email and click "Reconnect" for your email account. If using Gmail, ensure you've granted "full access" permissions. Check that the sender/recipient email matches a contact in NovaCRM. Note: email sync can take up to 5 minutes for new emails.

mail sync can take up to 5 minutes for new emails. Problem: Email tracking (opens/clicks) not working
Solution: Email tracking requires HTML emails (not plain text). Some email clients block tracking pixels — this is expected behavior. Corporate email servers may strip tracking pixels. Check Settings > Email > Tracking to ensure tracking is enabled.

> Email > Tracking to ensure tracking is enabled. Login Issues:
Problem: "Invalid credentials" error
Solution: Ensure you're using the correct email address (check for typos). Use the "Forgot Password" link to reset your password. If using SSO, you must log in through your identity provider, not the NovaCRM login page.

our identity provider, not the NovaCRM login page. Problem: Two-factor authentication (2FA) locked out
Solution: Use one of your backup codes (provided during 2FA setup). If you don't have backup codes, contact your organization's NovaCRM admin to reset 2FA. If you're the only admin, contact support@novacrm.com with identity verification.

ct support@novacrm.com with identity verification. API Issues:
Problem: Getting 401 Unauthorized errors
Solution: Check that your API key is included in the Authorization header as "Bearer nova_key_xxx". Verify the key hasn't been revoked in Settings > API Keys. Ensure the key has the required permissions for the endpoint you're calling.

uired permissions for the endpoint you're calling. Problem: Getting 429 Rate Limited errors
Solution: Check the X-RateLimit-Remaining header in your responses to monitor usage. Implement exponential backoff in your code. Consider upgrading your plan for higher rate limits. Use bulk endpoints instead of individual calls for batch operations.

instead of individual calls for batch operations. Problem: Webhook not receiving events
Solution: Verify the webhook URL is publicly accessible (not localhost). Check that the URL returns a 200 response within 10 seconds. NovaCRM retries failed webhooks 3 times with exponential backoff. Check the webhook delivery log in Settings > Webhooks.

k the webhook delivery log in Settings > Webhooks. Import Issues:
Problem: CSV import failing or contacts missing
Solution: Ensure CSV is UTF-8 encoded. Check that required fields (email or phone) are present. Remove any rows with more than 100 custom field values. Maximum file size is 50MB. For large files (>100,000 rows), use the API bulk import endpoint instead.

0 rows), use the API bulk import endpoint instead. Problem: Duplicate contacts after import
Solution: Enable "Skip duplicates" in the import wizard. Duplicates are matched by email address. Use the Merge Contacts feature (Contacts > Actions > Merge) to combine duplicates. Set up a deduplication workflow to automatically detect and merge duplicates going forward.

tically detect and merge duplicates going forward. Performance Issues:
Problem: Dashboard loading slowly
Solution: Reduce the date range of your reports. Use saved views instead of complex live filters. If you have >500,000 contacts, contact support for index optimization. Clear browser cache and try incognito mode to rule out extensions.

che and try incognito mode to rule out extensions. Problem: Search results seem incomplete
Solution: NovaCRM search indexes update every 60 seconds. Recently created/modified records may not appear immediately. Use the API for real-time search needs. Advanced search supports field-specific queries: "company:Acme AND tag:enterprise".

ecific queries: "company:Acme AND tag:enterprise". Mobile App Issues:
Problem: Push notifications not working
Solution: Ensure notifications are enabled in both the NovaCRM app settings AND your phone's system settings. On iOS, go to Settings > NovaCRM > Notifications. On Android, go to Settings > Apps > NovaCRM > Notifications. Log out and log back in to refresh the push token.

Log out and log back in to refresh the push token. Problem: Offline mode not syncing
Solution: Ensure you have a stable internet connection. Open the app and wait for the sync indicator to complete. If sync is stuck, force-close the app and reopen it. Maximum offline duration is 7 days — after that, a full re-sync is required.

s 7 days — after that, a full re-sync is required. Contact Support:
- Email: support@novacrm.com
- Phone: +1 (888) 555-NOVA (available 8am-8pm ET, Mon-Fri)
- Live chat: Available in the NovaCRM dashboard (Business and Enterprise plans)
- Status page: status.novacrm.com
- Knowledge base: help.novacrm.com

NovaCRM Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How long is the free trial?
A: The free trial lasts 14 days and includes full access to Business plan features. No credit card required. At the end of the trial, you can choose a plan or your account will be downgraded to a limited free tier (up to 100 contacts).

raded to a limited free tier (up to 100 contacts). Q: Can I change my plan at any time?
A: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time from Settings > Billing. Upgrades take effect immediately and are prorated. Downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

Q: Is there a free plan?
A: Yes, after the trial ends you can use the free tier with up to 100 contacts, basic contact management, and limited email integration. The free tier does not include phone, chat, automation, or AI features.

t include phone, chat, automation, or AI features. Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), ACH bank transfer (US only), and wire transfer (Enterprise plan only). We do not accept PayPal or cryptocurrency.

Q: Can I get a refund?
A: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for annual plans. Monthly plans can be cancelled at any time with no refund for the current month. Enterprise contracts have custom cancellation terms.

terprise contracts have custom cancellation terms. Q: How does per-user pricing work?
A: Each person who logs into NovaCRM needs a license. Contacts, leads, and external users do not require licenses. You can add or remove users at any time. Removed users' data is preserved and reassigned.

Q: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or education?
A: Yes, we offer 50% off any plan for registered nonprofits and educational institutions. Contact sales@novacrm.com with proof of status to apply.

t sales@novacrm.com with proof of status to apply. Q: Can I import data from Salesforce?
A: Yes, NovaCRM has a dedicated Salesforce migration tool that maps all standard and custom objects. The migration typically takes 1-4 hours depending on data volume. Custom fields, relationships, attachments, and activity history are all preserved. We recommend scheduling a migration call with our team.

commend scheduling a migration call with our team. Q: What languages does NovaCRM support?
A: The NovaCRM interface is available in 12 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Swedish, Japanese, Korean, Chinese (Simplified), and Arabic. The AI chatbot supports 25 languages for customer-facing interactions.

rts 25 languages for customer-facing interactions. Q: Is my data safe?
A: Yes. NovaCRM is SOC2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and offers HIPAA compliance as an add-on. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We do not use customer data to train shared AI models. See our security page at novacrm.com/security for full details.

Q: What's the uptime SLA?
A: Professional and Business plans include a 99.9% uptime SLA. Enterprise plans include a 99.99% uptime SLA. Current status is available at status.novacrm.com. In 2024, actual uptime was 99.997%.

s.novacrm.com. In 2024, actual uptime was 99.997%. Q: Can I use NovaCRM offline?
A: The mobile app supports offline mode for viewing and editing contacts, deals, and notes. Changes sync automatically when you're back online. The web app requires an internet connection.

Q: How do I cancel my account?
A: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. You'll have the option to export all your data before cancellation. Your data is retained for 30 days after cancellation in case you want to reactivate.

after cancellation in case you want to reactivate. Q: Do you have a partner/reseller program?
A: Yes, NovaCRM has a partner program for agencies, consultants, and technology partners. Partners receive commission on referrals, co-marketing support, and early access to new features. Apply at novacrm.com/partners.

ss to new features. Apply at novacrm.com/partners. Q: What's on the product roadmap?
A: We publish a public roadmap at novacrm.com/roadmap. Upcoming features include: AI email writing assistant (Q2 2025), advanced territory management (Q2 2025), custom AI model marketplace (Q3 2025), and native WhatsApp integration (Q3 2025).

NovaCRM Company Overview

NovaCRM is an AI-powered customer relationship management platform founded in 2021 in San Francisco. The company serves over 15,000 businesses worldwide, ranging from small startups to Fortune 500 enterprises.

ng from small startups to Fortune 500 enterprises. Our mission is to make every customer interaction intelligent, personalized, and effortless. NovaCRM combines traditional CRM capabilities with advanced AI features including predictive lead scoring, automated email campaigns, intelligent call routing, and real-time sentiment analysis.

nt call routing, and real-time sentiment analysis. NovaCRM was named a Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader in 2024 and has raised $180M in Series C funding led by Sequoia Capital. The platform processes over 2 billion customer interactions per month across email, phone, chat, and social media channels.

oss email, phone, chat, and social media channels. Key differentiators:
- AI-first architecture with models trained on 500M+ customer interactions
- Real-time analytics dashboard with customizable KPIs
- Native integrations with 200+ business tools
- SOC2 Type II and HIPAA compliant
- 99.99% uptime SLA for Enterprise customers

Contacts can be organized into segments, lists, and custom hierarchies. The system supports up to 50 million contacts per organization.

pports up to 50 million contacts per organization. Deal Pipeline:

Automated alerts when deals are at risk of stalling. Revenue forecasting uses historical close rates and current pipeline velocity.

torical close rates and current pipeline velocity. Email Automation:

Built-in A/B testing for subject lines, send times, and content variations. Supports dynamic content personalization with merge fields and conditional blocks.

lization with merge fields and conditional blocks. Phone System (NovaCRM Voice):
Built-in VoIP phone system with call recording, transcription, and real-time sentiment analysis. AI-powered call coaching provides real-time suggestions during customer calls. Automatic call logging and CRM record updates. Supports local and toll-free numbers in 40+ countries.

orts local and toll-free numbers in 40+ countries. Chat Widget (NovaCRM Chat):
Embeddable website chat widget with AI chatbot capabilities. The chatbot can answer common questions, qualify leads, and schedule meetings before routing to a human agent. Supports file sharing, screen sharing, and video calls within the chat interface. Available in 25 languages.

hin the chat interface. Available in 25 languages. Analytics & Reporting:

s, funnel visualization, and attribution modeling. Workflow Automation:

NovaCRM API Documentation — Overview

The NovaCRM API is a RESTful API that provides programmatic access to all CRM data and functionality. All API endpoints use HTTPS and return JSON responses.

Base URL: https://api.novacrm.com/v2

Authentication:
All API requests require authentication via API key. Include your API key in the Authorization header:
Authorization: Bearer nova_key_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

r:
Authorization: Bearer nova_key_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx API keys can be generated from Settings > Integrations > API Keys in the NovaCRM dashboard. Each key can be scoped to specific permissions (read-only, read-write, admin).

Rate Limits:
- Starter: 1,000 requests per day
- Professional: 10,000 requests per day
- Business: 100,000 requests per day
- Enterprise: Custom (typically 1,000,000+ per day)

Enterprise: Custom (typically 1,000,000+ per day) Rate limit headers are included in all responses:
- X-RateLimit-Limit: Maximum requests allowed
- X-RateLimit-Remaining: Requests remaining in current window
- X-RateLimit-Reset: Unix timestamp when the rate limit resets

When rate limited, the API returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.

he API returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header. Pagination:
List endpoints support cursor-based pagination:
- limit: Number of results per page (default: 20, max: 100)
- cursor: Cursor token from previous response
- sort: Field to sort by (prefix with - for descending)

h ID 12345 was not found",
    "status": 404
  }
} Common error codes:
- 400 BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request parameters
- 401 UNAUTHORIZED: Missing or invalid API key
- 403 FORBIDDEN: Insufficient permissions
- 404 RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: Requested resource doesn't exist
- 409 CONFLICT: Resource already exists or version conflict
- 429 RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests
- 500 INTERNAL_ERROR: Server error (contact support)

NovaCRM API — Contacts Endpoint

List Contacts:
GET /v2/contacts
Query parameters: limit, cursor, sort, email, company, created_after, created_before, tag
Returns a paginated list of contacts.

Get Contact:
GET /v2/contacts/{contact_id}
Returns a single contact with all fields and associated data.

ingle contact with all fields and associated data. Create Contact:
POST /v2/contacts
Required fields: email OR phone (at least one)
Optional fields: first_name, last_name, company, title, phone, address, tags, custom_fields
Returns the created contact with generated ID.

Update Contact:
PATCH /v2/contacts/{contact_id}
Send only the fields you want to update. Returns the updated contact.

Delete Contact:
DELETE /v2/contacts/{contact_id}
Soft-deletes the contact. Can be restored within 30 days from the trash.

ct. Can be restored within 30 days from the trash. Merge Contacts:
POST /v2/contacts/merge
Body: { "primary_id": "...", "secondary_ids": ["...", "..."] }
Merges multiple duplicate contacts into one. All interactions are preserved.

Bulk Operations:
POST /v2/contacts/bulk
Supports bulk create, update, and delete operations.
Maximum 1,000 contacts per request. Processed asynchronously for large batches.
Returns a job_id that can be polled for status.

s.
Returns a job_id that can be polled for status. Contact Timeline:
GET /v2/contacts/{contact_id}/timeline
Returns all interactions (emails, calls, meetings, notes, deals) in chronological order.
Supports filtering by interaction type and date range.

Contact Enrichment:
POST /v2/contacts/{contact_id}/enrich
Triggers AI-powered data enrichment. Automatically fills in company info, social profiles, and job details from public sources. Costs $0.05 per enrichment.

NovaCRM API — Deals Endpoint

List Deals:
GET /v2/deals
Query parameters: limit, cursor, sort, stage, owner_id, pipeline_id, value_min, value_max
Returns a paginated list of deals.

Get Deal:
GET /v2/deals/{deal_id}
Returns a single deal with all fields, associated contacts, and activity history.

Create Deal:
POST /v2/deals
Required fields: name, pipeline_id
Optional fields: stage_id, value, currency, expected_close_date, owner_id, contact_ids, company_id, custom_fields
Returns the created deal.

ompany_id, custom_fields
Returns the created deal. Update Deal:
PATCH /v2/deals/{deal_id}
Send only the fields to update. Changing stage_id triggers pipeline automation.

Move Deal Stage:
POST /v2/deals/{deal_id}/move
Body: { "stage_id": "...", "note": "..." }
Moves a deal to a new stage and optionally adds a note. Triggers any configured stage-change automations.

Win/Lose Deal:
POST /v2/deals/{deal_id}/win
POST /v2/deals/{deal_id}/lose
Body: { "reason": "...", "note": "..." }
Marks a deal as won or lost with an optional reason and note.

l as won or lost with an optional reason and note. Deal Forecast:
GET /v2/deals/forecast
Query parameters: period (monthly, quarterly, yearly), pipeline_id
Returns AI-powered revenue forecast based on current pipeline, historical close rates, and deal health scores.

Deal Health Score:
GET /v2/deals/{deal_id}/health
Returns an AI-generated health score (0-100) with risk factors and recommended actions. Factors include: time in stage, engagement level, competitor mentions, and sentiment trends.

NovaCRM Security & Compliance

Data Security:
- All data encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256)
- Data stored in SOC2 Type II certified data centers (AWS us-east-1, eu-west-1)
- Automatic daily backups with 30-day retention
- Point-in-time recovery available for Enterprise customers
- Data residency options: US, EU, or Australia

ers
- Data residency options: US, EU, or Australia Access Control:
- Role-based access control (RBAC) with customizable roles
- Object-level and field-level permissions
- IP whitelisting (Business and Enterprise plans)
- Two-factor authentication (2FA) required for all accounts
- SSO via SAML 2.0 (Business and Enterprise plans)
- Session management with configurable timeout

ns)

- SOC2 Type II certified (report available upon request)
- GDPR compliant with data processing agreement (DPA)
- CCPA compliant

- Bug bounty program via HackerOne

by CrowdStrike

- AI model training: Customer data is NOT used to train shared AI models. Enterprise customers can opt-in to train custom models on their own data.

n opt-in to train custom models on their own data. Incident Response:

NovaCRM Getting Started Guide

Step 1: Create Your Account
Visit app.novacrm.com/signup and enter your email address. You'll receive a verification email within 30 seconds. Click the link to activate your account and set your password. No credit card required for the 14-day free trial.

No credit card required for the 14-day free trial. Step 2: Set Up Your Organization
After signing in, you'll be guided through initial setup:
- Company name and industry
- Team size and primary use case
- Timezone and currency preferences
- Logo upload (displayed in emails and chat widget)

Logo upload (displayed in emails and chat widget) Step 3: Import Your Data
NovaCRM supports importing contacts and deals from:
- CSV/Excel files (up to 500,000 rows per import)
- Salesforce (full migration tool with field mapping)
- HubSpot (full migration tool with field mapping)
- Pipedrive (contact and deal import)
- Google Contacts
- Outlook Contacts

The import wizard guides you through field mapping and deduplication. Large imports (>50,000 contacts) are processed in the background and typically complete within 30 minutes.

ckground and typically complete within 30 minutes. Step 4: Connect Your Email
Go to Settings > Email and connect your Gmail or Outlook account. This enables:
- Automatic email logging to contact records
- Send emails directly from NovaCRM
- Email open and click tracking
- Email templates and sequences

and click tracking
- Email templates and sequences Step 5: Set Up Your Pipeline
Navigate to Deals > Pipeline Settings to customize your sales stages. Default stages are: Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost. You can rename, add, or remove stages. Set probability percentages for revenue forecasting.

Step 6: Invite Your Team
Go to Settings > Team to invite colleagues. Assign roles (Admin, Manager, Sales Rep, Read-Only) to control access. Managers can see their team's activities and pipeline. Admins have full access to all settings.

pipeline. Admins have full access to all settings. Step 7: Install Integrations
Connect your essential tools from Settings > Integrations. Recommended first integrations: email provider, calendar, and Slack/Teams for notifications.

Step 8: Customize Your Workspace
- Create custom fields for contacts and deals
- Set up saved views and filters
- Configure notification preferences
- Set up workflow automations for common tasks

Need help? Book a free 30-minute onboarding call at novacrm.com/onboarding or contact support@novacrm.com.

NovaCRM Troubleshooting Guide

Email Sync Issues:
Problem: Emails not appearing in contact timeline
Solution: Go to Settings > Email and click "Reconnect" for your email account. If using Gmail, ensure you've granted "full access" permissions. Check that the sender/recipient email matches a contact in NovaCRM. Note: email sync can take up to 5 minutes for new emails.

mail sync can take up to 5 minutes for new emails. Problem: Email tracking (opens/clicks) not working
Solution: Email tracking requires HTML emails (not plain text). Some email clients block tracking pixels — this is expected behavior. Corporate email servers may strip tracking pixels. Check Settings > Email > Tracking to ensure tracking is enabled.

> Email > Tracking to ensure tracking is enabled. Login Issues:
Problem: "Invalid credentials" error
Solution: Ensure you're using the correct email address (check for typos). Use the "Forgot Password" link to reset your password. If using SSO, you must log in through your identity provider, not the NovaCRM login page.

our identity provider, not the NovaCRM login page. Problem: Two-factor authentication (2FA) locked out
Solution: Use one of your backup codes (provided during 2FA setup). If you don't have backup codes, contact your organization's NovaCRM admin to reset 2FA. If you're the only admin, contact support@novacrm.com with identity verification.

ct support@novacrm.com with identity verification. API Issues:
Problem: Getting 401 Unauthorized errors
Solution: Check that your API key is included in the Authorization header as "Bearer nova_key_xxx". Verify the key hasn't been revoked in Settings > API Keys. Ensure the key has the required permissions for the endpoint you're calling.

uired permissions for the endpoint you're calling. Problem: Getting 429 Rate Limited errors
Solution: Check the X-RateLimit-Remaining header in your responses to monitor usage. Implement exponential backoff in your code. Consider upgrading your plan for higher rate limits. Use bulk endpoints instead of individual calls for batch operations.

instead of individual calls for batch operations. Problem: Webhook not receiving events
Solution: Verify the webhook URL is publicly accessible (not localhost). Check that the URL returns a 200 response within 10 seconds. NovaCRM retries failed webhooks 3 times with exponential backoff. Check the webhook delivery log in Settings > Webhooks.

k the webhook delivery log in Settings > Webhooks. Import Issues:
Problem: CSV import failing or contacts missing
Solution: Ensure CSV is UTF-8 encoded. Check that required fields (email or phone) are present. Remove any rows with more than 100 custom field values. Maximum file size is 50MB. For large files (>100,000 rows), use the API bulk import endpoint instead.

0 rows), use the API bulk import endpoint instead. Problem: Duplicate contacts after import
Solution: Enable "Skip duplicates" in the import wizard. Duplicates are matched by email address. Use the Merge Contacts feature (Contacts > Actions > Merge) to combine duplicates. Set up a deduplication workflow to automatically detect and merge duplicates going forward.

tically detect and merge duplicates going forward. Performance Issues:
Problem: Dashboard loading slowly
Solution: Reduce the date range of your reports. Use saved views instead of complex live filters. If you have >500,000 contacts, contact support for index optimization. Clear browser cache and try incognito mode to rule out extensions.

che and try incognito mode to rule out extensions. Problem: Search results seem incomplete
Solution: NovaCRM search indexes update every 60 seconds. Recently created/modified records may not appear immediately. Use the API for real-time search needs. Advanced search supports field-specific queries: "company:Acme AND tag:enterprise".

ecific queries: "company:Acme AND tag:enterprise". Mobile App Issues:
Problem: Push notifications not working
Solution: Ensure notifications are enabled in both the NovaCRM app settings AND your phone's system settings. On iOS, go to Settings > NovaCRM > Notifications. On Android, go to Settings > Apps > NovaCRM > Notifications. Log out and log back in to refresh the push token.

Log out and log back in to refresh the push token. Problem: Offline mode not syncing
Solution: Ensure you have a stable internet connection. Open the app and wait for the sync indicator to complete. If sync is stuck, force-close the app and reopen it. Maximum offline duration is 7 days — after that, a full re-sync is required.

s 7 days — after that, a full re-sync is required. Contact Support:
- Email: support@novacrm.com
- Phone: +1 (888) 555-NOVA (available 8am-8pm ET, Mon-Fri)
- Live chat: Available in the NovaCRM dashboard (Business and Enterprise plans)
- Status page: status.novacrm.com
- Knowledge base: help.novacrm.com

NovaCRM Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How long is the free trial?
A: The free trial lasts 14 days and includes full access to Business plan features. No credit card required. At the end of the trial, you can choose a plan or your account will be downgraded to a limited free tier (up to 100 contacts).

raded to a limited free tier (up to 100 contacts). Q: Can I change my plan at any time?
A: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time from Settings > Billing. Upgrades take effect immediately and are prorated. Downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.

Q: Is there a free plan?
A: Yes, after the trial ends you can use the free tier with up to 100 contacts, basic contact management, and limited email integration. The free tier does not include phone, chat, automation, or AI features.

t include phone, chat, automation, or AI features. Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), ACH bank transfer (US only), and wire transfer (Enterprise plan only). We do not accept PayPal or cryptocurrency.

Q: Can I get a refund?
A: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for annual plans. Monthly plans can be cancelled at any time with no refund for the current month. Enterprise contracts have custom cancellation terms.

terprise contracts have custom cancellation terms. Q: How does per-user pricing work?
A: Each person who logs into NovaCRM needs a license. Contacts, leads, and external users do not require licenses. You can add or remove users at any time. Removed users' data is preserved and reassigned.

Q: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or education?
A: Yes, we offer 50% off any plan for registered nonprofits and educational institutions. Contact sales@novacrm.com with proof of status to apply.

t sales@novacrm.com with proof of status to apply. Q: Can I import data from Salesforce?
A: Yes, NovaCRM has a dedicated Salesforce migration tool that maps all standard and custom objects. The migration typically takes 1-4 hours depending on data volume. Custom fields, relationships, attachments, and activity history are all preserved. We recommend scheduling a migration call with our team.

commend scheduling a migration call with our team. Q: What languages does NovaCRM support?
A: The NovaCRM interface is available in 12 languages: English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Swedish, Japanese, Korean, Chinese (Simplified), and Arabic. The AI chatbot supports 25 languages for customer-facing interactions.

rts 25 languages for customer-facing interactions. Q: Is my data safe?
A: Yes. NovaCRM is SOC2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and offers HIPAA compliance as an add-on. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We do not use customer data to train shared AI models. See our security page at novacrm.com/security for full details.

Q: What's the uptime SLA?
A: Professional and Business plans include a 99.9% uptime SLA. Enterprise plans include a 99.99% uptime SLA. Current status is available at status.novacrm.com. In 2024, actual uptime was 99.997%.

s.novacrm.com. In 2024, actual uptime was 99.997%. Q: Can I use NovaCRM offline?
A: The mobile app supports offline mode for viewing and editing contacts, deals, and notes. Changes sync automatically when you're back online. The web app requires an internet connection.

Q: How do I cancel my account?
A: Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. You'll have the option to export all your data before cancellation. Your data is retained for 30 days after cancellation in case you want to reactivate.

after cancellation in case you want to reactivate. Q: Do you have a partner/reseller program?
A: Yes, NovaCRM has a partner program for agencies, consultants, and technology partners. Partners receive commission on referrals, co-marketing support, and early access to new features. Apply at novacrm.com/partners.

ss to new features. Apply at novacrm.com/partners. Q: What's on the product roadmap?
A: We publish a public roadmap at novacrm.com/roadmap. Upcoming features include: AI email writing assistant (Q2 2025), advanced territory management (Q2 2025), custom AI model marketplace (Q3 2025), and native WhatsApp integration (Q3 2025).
